tool_args.label: B46 SBS
tool_args.raw_text: B46 Select Bus Service Route

payload.description: B46 Select Bus Service running between Avenue U (Kings Plaza) and DeKalb Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: A map of Brooklyn, New York, showing the B46 Select Bus Service (SBS) route. The route is highlighted with a thick blue line and runs north-south along Malcolm X Blvd. Key stops are marked with white circles containing a cross. From south to north, the stops are: Ave U (Kings Plaza), Ave N, Flatlands Av, Ave H, Ave D, Church Av, Winthrop St, Empire Blvd, Eastern Pkwy, Fulton St, Halsey St, Gates Av, and DeKalb Av.
B46 SBS will run between Avenue U (Kings Plaza) and DeKalb Avenue
